overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking along a sunny urban waterfront promenade. The character passes pedestrians, concrete planters, and a wooden dock structure while modern skyscrapers rise across the water in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade with concrete planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade passing large concrete planters

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter containing reddish-brown shrubbery
silver metal railing separating walkway from the water
calm river water with gentle ripples reflecting sunlight
tall glass and steel skyscrapers lining the opposite riverbank
row of parked vehicles along the right side of the promenade
black ornate street lamp with dual lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny waterfront promenade with large concrete planters on the left and parked cars on the right. The river stretches out to the left with modern skyscrapers visible across the water, while pedestrians walk ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway passing wooden dock structure

events.description: wooden dock structure comes into view on the left side of the walkway
character passes by pedestrians standing on the dock and walking along the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade passing the wooden dock and oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: people standing on the wooden dock looking out at the water
man in gray business suit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier structure extending into the river with vertical posts and platform

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a wooden dock structure extending into the river on the left, where several people are standing. The concrete planters and parked cars from the previous section are no longer visible as the path opens up, and more pedestrians walk toward the character from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with tree canopy

events.description: wooden dock exits view behind character, scene opens to tree-lined section

agents.ego_description: walking past groups of pedestrians along the open waterfront with trees on the right

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians including person in orange jacket conversing near the trees

entered.detail: mature leafy trees providing shade along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Past the dock area, the character continues along the waterfront promenade now lined with mature trees on the right side. The wooden dock has receded from view, and the character passes groups of pedestrians while the river and distant skyscrapers remain constant on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny urban waterfront that shifts from a structured promenade into a more open, tree-lined walkway. It begins with the character walking past large concrete planters and parked cars, with the river and a skyline of modern skyscrapers stretching out to the left. As the character advances, the path opens up and the concrete barriers disappear, leading the camera past a wooden dock structure where several people are gathered by the water. The scene then shifts as the dock recedes from view and the right side of the promenade becomes lined with mature trees. Finally, the character continues forward through groups of pedestrians while the distant city skyline remains a constant backdrop across the river.
